calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S.Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
David J. Cook, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California.
Plaintiff's witness: Tracey mcCormick, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant: Jeffrey J. Hegberg, the sum of $50,000.00 in principal.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2004 Continued To Aug-02-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-18-2004 Continued To Jul-15-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on for Default Prove Up
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR:Yvonne Lee.
No appearances, this matter is continued to Thursday, July 15, 2004 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 218 at plaintiff's request.
